The total number of power punches across all three matches is the sum of the punches from each match. To find the total, we add the punches from the first, second, and third matches. That would be 120 (first match) + 150 (second match) + 180 (third match). Adding these together gives 120 + 150 = 270, and then 270 + 180 = 450. Therefore, the total number of power punches he landed across all three matches is 450. This total reflects his consistent effort and the effectiveness of his training.
